recommendations.title: Letter from an Unknown Woman
recommendations.overview: A pianist about to flee from a duel receives a letter from a woman he cannot remember. As she tells the story of her lifelong love for him, he is forced to reinterpret his own past.

recommendations.title: Lola Montès
recommendations.overview: Lola Montes, previously a great adventuress, is reduced to being the attraction of a circus after having been the lover of various important men.

recommendations.title: The Reckless Moment
recommendations.overview: After discovering the dead body of her teenage daughter's lover, a housewife takes desperate measures to protect her family from scandal.

recommendations.title: La Ronde
recommendations.overview: An all-knowing interlocutor guides us through a series of affairs in Vienna, 1900. A soldier meets an eager young lady of the evening. Later he has an affair with a young lady, who becomes a maid and does similarly with the young man of the house. Th

recommendations.title: The Earrings of Madame de...
recommendations.overview: In late 19th century France, the Countess Louise, wife of a wealthy general, sells the earrings her husband gave her on their wedding day to pay off her secret debts, then claims to have lost them. Her husband quickly learns of the deceit, which is t

recommendations.title: Secret Things
recommendations.overview: Two young women find themselves struggling to survive in Paris, street-wise Nathalie, a stripper, and naïve Sandrine, a barmaid. Together, they discover that sex can be used to their advantage, and pleasure.

recommendations.title: Dallas Buyers Club
recommendations.overview: Loosely based on the true-life tale of Ron Woodroof, a drug-taking, women-loving, homophobic man who in 1986 was diagnosed with HIV/AIDS and given thirty days to live.

recommendations.title: Book Club
recommendations.overview: Four lifelong friends decide that their lives could change by becoming nasty and reading Fifty Shades of Grey in their monthly book club to get inspiration on how to handle sexual pleasure at an elderly age.

recommendations.title: Ode to Joy
recommendations.overview: Charlie suffers from a serious disease that causes acute narcolepsy whenever he is happy. Although he develops a variety of techniques to deny himself pleasure and deal with his sleep issues, they’re put to the test when he falls in love.

recommendations.title: Love and Leashes
recommendations.overview: Love never hurt so good for two co-workers who enter a contractual relationship as partners in consensual play, pleasure and pain.
